methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series A → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.0x) to $300M last post money.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 3 same-sector + same-stage peers in Defense & Security. Range: $150M - $29.0B.

private.name: Scale AI
private.rationale: Same sector (Defense & Security), same stage (Series A), post-money $29B

private.name: Stark Defence
private.rationale: Same sector (Defense & Security), same stage (Series A), post-money $500M

private.name: Ares Industries
private.rationale: Same sector (Defense & Security), same stage (Series A), post-money $150M

data.narrative:
Vatn Systems, a Series A-stage defense and security company founded by Nelson Mills, is valued at $300M post-money following $76.5M in total capital raised. The valuation assessment draws from a comparable universe of 10 private companies and 2 public peers (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) operating in the Defense & Security sector at equivalent or proximate stages.

Two triangulation methods were applied. Stage-progression analysis applies a 2.0x step-up multiplier typical of Series A advancement to the $300M last post-money valuation, implying $600M. Peer-median analysis examines three same-sector, same-stage comparables—Scale AI ($29.0B), Stark Defence ($500M), and Ares Industries ($150M)—yielding a median of $500M and a range spanning $150M to $29.0B. The wide spread reflects material dispersion in the peer set, with Scale AI representing an outlier. The median peer valuation of $500M anchors to the lower end of stage-progression output.

These methods triangulate to a valuation range of $425M (low) to $690M (high), with a median of $550M. The current $300M valuation sits below this range, suggesting modest upside potential to mid-point. Key uncertainties include peer-set homogeneity—the 190x spread between Ares Industries and Scale AI limits confidence in peer-driven estimates—and whether stage-progression multipliers empirically hold in frontier-tech defense markets. Further analysis of revenue multiples or capital efficiency metrics would strengthen conviction.
